summary: Iteration 13 testing complete: T&C checkbox on registration, Logout/Delete Account buttons in profile, and auto-login session persistence. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: T&C checkbox implementation uses emoji icons (⬜/☑️) which is accessible but unconventional
Registration button correctly disabled via CSS opacity when T&C not accepted
Delete account endpoint properly cleans up all user data from multiple collections (GDPR compliant)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 features verified working. T&C checkbox on register page with 'Termini e Condizioni' link to /privacy. Profile page has Disconnetti (logout) and Elimina Account (delete) buttons. Session token persisted via AsyncStorage enables auto-login after refresh.

tc_checkbox_present.details: Checkbox with emoji ⬜/☑️ found on /register page with text 'Accetto i Termini e Condizioni'

register_button_disabled_state.details: Registrati button has opacity 0.5 (faded) and disabled when T&C not accepted

tc_link_navigation.details: Clicking 'Termini e Condizioni' link navigates to /privacy page

privacy_page_content.details: /privacy shows full T&C: DEFINIZIONI E LICENZA D'USO, DIVIETI ESPLICITI (Reverse Engineering, Model Scraping, Prompt Injection), CLAUSOLA DI RISOLUZIONE AUTOMATICA, SAFE HARBOR CLAUSE, LIMITAZIONE DI RESPONSABILITÀ

logout_button_visible.details: 'Disconnetti' button visible in Account section of profile page with red exit icon

logout_functionality.details: Clicking Disconnetti shows confirmation dialog, then redirects to /login page

delete_account_button_visible.details: 'Elimina Account' button visible in Account section of profile page with trash icon

delete_account_api.details: DELETE /api/auth/delete-account returns 200 and removes all user data from collections

auto_login_session_persistence.details: After login, page refresh maintains session. User can navigate between pages without re-login

session_token_storage.details: Session token saved to AsyncStorage and sent via Authorization header for API calls

screenshots_taken: /app/.screenshots/tc_privacy_page.png - Privacy page after clicking T&C link
